files.Title: Flame.AccessorKind
files.Summary: Constrains the signature of a property accessor.

files.Title: Flame.AssemblyIdentity
files.Summary: A reference to a particular assembly.

files.Title: Flame.AttributeMap
files.Summary: Defines a container that facilitates quick type-based attribute lookups.

files.Title: Flame.AttributeMapBuilder
files.Summary: Defines a mutable attribute map.

files.Title: Flame.Clr.Analysis.CilCatchHandler
files.Summary: A CIL exception handler that has typical 'catch' behavior: it is triggered when an exception is thrown and does not have special interactions with 'leave' instructions.

files.Title: Flame.Clr.Analysis.CilExceptionHandler
files.Summary: Describes a CIL exception handler.

files.Title: Flame.Clr.Analysis.CilFilterHandler
files.Summary: A CIL exception handler backed by a filter clause.

files.Title: Flame.Clr.Analysis.CilFinallyHandler
files.Summary: A CIL exception handler that has typical 'finally' behavior: it intercepts 'leave' branches.

files.Title: Flame.Clr.Analysis.CilPrototypeExceptionSpecs
files.Summary: Exception specifications for prototypes that rely on CIL's semantics.

files.Title: Flame.Clr.Analysis.ClrInstructionSimplifier
files.Summary: Simplifies CIL instructions by rewriting them.

files.Title: Flame.Clr.Analysis.ClrMethodBodyAnalyzer
files.Summary: A data structure that analyzes CIL instructions and translates them to Flame IR.

files.Title: Flame.Clr.CanonicalizeArrayInit
files.Summary: An intraprocedural transform that recognizes the InitializeArray array initialization idiom and canonicalizes it as a sequence of direct initialization instructions.

files.Title: Flame.Clr.CecilAssemblyResolver
files.Summary: An assembly resolver implementation that forwards assembly resolution requests to Mono.Cecil assembly resolver.

files.Title: Flame.Clr.ClrAccessorDefinition
files.Summary: A Flame accessor that wraps an IL method definition.

files.Title: Flame.Clr.ClrArrayType
files.Summary: An IL array type of a particular rank.

files.Title: Flame.Clr.ClrAssembly
files.Summary: A Flame assembly that wraps a Cecil assembly definition.

files.Title: Flame.Clr.ClrFieldDefinition
files.Summary: A CLR field definition.

files.Title: Flame.Clr.ClrGenericParameter
files.Summary: A Flame type that wraps an IL generic parameter.

files.Title: Flame.Clr.ClrMethodDefinition
files.Summary: A Flame method that wraps an IL method definition.

files.Title: Flame.Clr.ClrModifierType
files.Summary: An IL type that modifies a type by slapping on a required or optional modifier.

files.Title: Flame.Clr.ClrPropertyDefinition
files.Summary: A Flame property that wraps an IL property definition.

files.Title: Flame.Clr.ClrPropertySignature
files.Summary: A data structure that represents the parts of an IL property signature that are relevant to property reference resolution.

files.Title: Flame.Clr.ClrSubtypingRules
files.Summary: Subtyping rules for the CLR's type system.

files.Title: Flame.Clr.ClrTypeDefinition
files.Summary: A Flame type that wraps an IL type definition.

files.Title: Flame.Clr.CorlibTypeEnvironment
files.Summary: A type environment that extracts relevant BCL types from a single core library based on their names.

files.Title: Flame.Clr.Emit.CilPeepholeOptimizer
files.Summary: A peephole optimizer for CIL instructions.

files.Title: Flame.Clr.Emit.ClrMethodBodyEmitter
files.Summary: Converts a Flame IR method body to a CLR method body.

files.Title: Flame.Clr.NameConversion
files.Summary: A collection of functions that help convert back and forth between Flame names and IL names.

files.Title: Flame.Clr.ReferenceResolver
files.Summary: A data structure that resolves IL references as Flame members.

files.Title: Flame.Clr.Transforms.CanonicalizeDelegates
files.Summary: An intraprocedural transform that turns CIL idioms for delegates into specialized Flame IR instructions.

files.Title: Flame.Clr.Transforms.ExpandLinq
files.Summary: An optimization that replaces select LINQ methods with tailored implementations.

files.Title: Flame.Clr.Transforms.LowerBox
files.Summary: A transform that lowers reference type creating 'box' instructions to 'newobj' instructions if possible and calls to well-known functions if not.

files.Title: Flame.Clr.Transforms.LowerDelegates
files.Summary: An intraprocedural transform that turns Flame IR's dedicated delegate instructions into CIL idioms.

files.Title: Flame.Clr.TypeHelpers
files.Summary: Defines helper methods for bridging the gap between IL's implicit reference types and Flame's explicit box pointers.

files.Title: Flame.Collections.Betterness
files.Summary: Specifies if one of two items is better than the other.

files.Title: Flame.Collections.BetternessExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods related to the BetterResult enum.

files.Title: Flame.Collections.Cache<TKey, TValue>
files.Summary: A base class for cache data structures.

files.Title: Flame.Collections.DeferredInitializer
files.Summary: A type of object that guarantees thread-safe, on-demand initialization. An initialization action is only executed once.

files.Title: Flame.Collections.EmptyArray<T>
files.Summary: Exposes an empty array.

files.Title: Flame.Collections.EnumerableComparer<T>
files.Summary: An element-wise equality comparer for sequences of values.

files.Title: Flame.Collections.EnumerableComparer
files.Summary: An element-wise equality comparer for sequences of values.

files.Title: Flame.Collections.ImmutableOrderedDictionary<TKey, TValue>.Builder
files.Summary: A mutable wrapper around an immutable ordered dictionary.

files.Title: Flame.Collections.ImmutableOrderedDictionary<TKey, TValue>
files.Summary: An immutable dictionary that iterates over elements in the order they were added.

files.Title: Flame.Collections.ImmutableOrderedDictionary
files.Summary: An immutable dictionary that iterates over elements in the order they were added.

files.Title: Flame.Collections.Index<TContainer, TKey, TValue>
files.Summary: A data structure that memoizes lookups by key in a data structure.

files.Title: Flame.Collections.InterningCache<T>
files.Summary: A cache that interns values: it maps each input value to a value that is structurally equal to the input and all structurally equal input values are mapped to the same output value as long as that output value is live.

files.Title: Flame.Collections.LruCache<TKey, TValue>
files.Summary: A cache implementation that uses the least recently used (LRU) policy to evict stale key-value pairs.

files.Title: Flame.Collections.MappedComparer<T1, T2>
files.Summary: An equality comparer that applies a mapping to elements before comparing them.

files.Title: Flame.Collections.ReadOnlyListExtensions
files.Summary: Extensions that make manipulating read-only lists easier.

files.Title: Flame.Collections.ReadOnlySlice<T>
files.Summary: A slice of a read-only list.

files.Title: Flame.Collections.SmallMultiDictionary<TKey, TValue>
files.Summary: A small, memory-friendly and cache-friendly dictionary with O(n) asymptotic complexity for all operations.

files.Title: Flame.Collections.StronglyConnectedComponents
files.Summary: Defines algorithms that compute strongly connected components.

files.Title: Flame.Collections.SymmetricRelation<T>
files.Summary: Describes a symmetric relation between values: a set of two-element sets.

files.Title: Flame.Collections.TreeSearchAlgorithm<TInternalNode, TLeafNode>
files.Summary: A base class for algorithms that search trees.

files.Title: Flame.Collections.UniqueNameMap<T>
files.Summary: Generates a unique name for every value that is given to it. Generated names are stored. Requesting a name for the same object more than once always results in the same unique name.

files.Title: Flame.Collections.UniqueNameSet<T>
files.Summary: Generates a unique name for every value it is passed. Generated names are stored, but not associated with the object they originated from: generating a name for the same object twice will always result in two different unique names. The resulting name will never be null or empty.

files.Title: Flame.Collections.ValueList<T>
files.Summary: A growable list that is implemented as a value type. This type is mainly intended for use by other collection types, and is not a drop-in replacement for System.Collections.Generic.List.

files.Title: Flame.Collections.WeakCache<TKey, TValue>
files.Summary: A cache that maps keys to values for as long as neither the key nor the value of a key-value pair is garbage-collected. Weak caches do not prevent keys or values from being garbage-collected.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.AddBasicBlockUpdate
files.Summary: A flow graph update that adds a basic block to the flow graph.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.AddInstructionUpdate
files.Summary: A flow graph update that inserts an instruction.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.AliasAnalysisResult
files.Summary: A data structure that captures the result of applying alias analysis to a control-flow graph.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.Aliasing
files.Summary: Enumerates possible aliasing relations between pointers.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.BasicBlockFlowUpdate
files.Summary: A flow graph update that sets the outgoing flow of a basic block.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.BasicBlockParametersUpdate
files.Summary: A flow graph update that sets the parameters of a basic block.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.BasicBlockPredecessors
files.Summary: A data structure that can be queried to get the predecessors of a block, that is, the set of all blocks that have branches to the block.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.BasicBlockUpdate
files.Summary: A flow graph update at the basic block level: the insertion, deletion or modification of a basic block.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.BlockFixpointAnalysis<TBlockState>.Result
files.Summary: The result of a block fixpoint analysis.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.BlockFixpointAnalysis<TBlockState>
files.Summary: A base class for analyses that process blocks until they reach a fixpoint.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.BlockLiveness
files.Summary: Contains value liveness data for a single block.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.BlockReachability
files.Summary: A description of which blocks can reach other blocks in a control-flow graph.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.ConservativeInstructionOrderingAnalysis
files.Summary: A conservative analysis that determines the must-run-before relation between instructions. The must-run-before relation is determined by imposing a total ordering on effectful instructions.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.ConstantAnalysis<T>
files.Summary: An analysis that always returns the same result. This kind of analysis is particularly useful for adding metadata to flow graphs that encode a (user-specified) configuration, such as the exception delayability policy.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.DefaultAnalyses
files.Summary: Manages a collection of default control-flow graph analyses, which are used when no analysis is explicitly added to a graph.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.DominatorTree
files.Summary: A data structure that describes the dominator tree of a control-flow graph.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.DominatorTreeAnalysis
files.Summary: An analysis that computes dominator trees for control-flow graphs.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.EffectfulInstructionAnalysis
files.Summary: An analysis that produces the set of all effectful instructions in a graph.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.EffectfulInstructions
files.Summary: The set of instructions in a graph that may have side-effects.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.ExceptionDelayability
files.Summary: A base class for rules about whether or not exceptions thrown by particular types of instructions may be delayed until the value they produce is used by an effectful instruction.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.ExceptionDelayabilityExtensions
files.Summary: Defines extension methods related to exception delayability.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.ExplicitInstructionExceptionSpecs
files.Summary: An explicit mapping of instructions to their exception specifications.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.FlowGraphUpdate
files.Summary: Describes an update to a flow graph.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.GreedyRegisterAllocator<TRegister>
files.Summary: An analysis that greedily allocates registers to values. The set of values is assumed to be unbounded: the analysis is allowed to "create" an arbitrarily large amount of registers.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.IFlowGraphAnalysis<T>
files.Summary: An analysis on a flow graph.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.InstructionExceptionSpecs
files.Summary: Maps instructions to their exception specifications.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.InstructionOrdering
files.Summary: Captures the must-run-before relation between instructions. All instruction orderings that respect this relation are legal and computationally equivalent.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.InstructionUpdate
files.Summary: A flow graph update at the instruction level: the insertion, deletion or replacement of an instruction. These updates don't affect the control flow graph itself.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.InterferenceGraph
files.Summary: A symmetric relation that tells if there is some point at which two arbitrary values are both live.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.InterferenceGraphAnalysis
files.Summary: An analysis that constructs an interference graph.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.LatticeAnalysis<TCell>
files.Summary: A base class for flow-sensitive data analyses that assign analysis results to values by repeatedly computing lattice meet operations.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.LatticeAnalysisResult<TCell>
files.Summary: The result of a lattice analysis.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.LazyBlockReachability
files.Summary: A block reachability implementation that performs reachability analysis on an on-demand basis and caches the results.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.LazyBlockReachabilityAnalysis
files.Summary: An analysis that finds computes block reachability information on an on-demand basis.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.LivenessAnalysis
files.Summary: An analysis that determines which variables are live at any location in a control flow graph.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.LocalMemorySSAAnalysis
files.Summary: A very simple, block-local memory SSA analysis.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.MapMembersUpdate
files.Summary: A flow graph update that applies a mapping to every member in the flow graph.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.MemorySSA.Phi
files.Summary: A memory SSA phi, which sets the memory state to one of a list of potential memory SSA states.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.MemorySSA.Store
files.Summary: A memory SSA value that represents an update of another memory SSA value.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.MemorySSA.Unknown
files.Summary: A memory SSA value that represents a completely unknown state.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.MemorySSA.Value
files.Summary: A memory SSA value, i.e., a state that memory can have.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.MemorySSA
files.Summary: A mapping of instructions to memory SSA states.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.MemorySpecification.ArgumentRead
files.Summary: A read from an address encoded by an argument.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.MemorySpecification.ArgumentWrite
files.Summary: A write to an address encoded by an argument.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.MemorySpecification.Union
files.Summary: A union of memory access specs.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.MemorySpecification
files.Summary: A base class for descriptions of how an instruction interacts with memory.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.MemorySpecificationExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods that make working with memory specifications easier.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.NullCheckExceptionSpecification
files.Summary: An exception specification for an instruction parameter null check.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.NullabilityAnalysis
files.Summary: A simple nullability analysis.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.PermissiveExceptionDelayability
files.Summary: Exception delayability rules that allow delaying exceptions for implicit checks when computing pointers.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.PredecessorAnalysis
files.Summary: An analysis that finds basic block predecessors.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.PrototypeExceptionSpecs
files.Summary: Maps instruction prototypes to exception specifications.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.PrototypeMemorySpecs
files.Summary: Maps instruction prototypes to memory access specs.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.RegisterAllocation<TRegister>
files.Summary: An allocation of values to registers.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.ReifiedInstructionExceptionAnalysis
files.Summary: An analysis that infers instruction specification specifications by refining the exception specifications for their prototypes.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.RelatedValueAnalysis
files.Summary: An analysis that computes the related value--relation for graphs.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.RelatedValues
files.Summary:
A symmetric relation that consists of all pairs of values that are direct copies of each other.

A value is deemed a copy of another value if the former is produced by a copy instruction that references the latter or if the former is a block parameter and there is a branch that specifies the latter as the argument to the former.

This information can be useful for the purpose of register allocation: allocating two related values to the same register will elide a copy.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.RemoveBasicBlockUpdate
files.Summary: A flow graph update that removes a basic block from the flow graph.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.RemoveInstructionUpdate
files.Summary: A flow graph update that removes an instruction.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.ReplaceInstructionUpdate
files.Summary: A flow graph update that replaces an instruction.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.RuleBasedPrototypeExceptionSpecs
files.Summary: Assigns exception specifications to prototypes based on a set of user-configurable rules.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.RuleBasedPrototypeMemorySpecs
files.Summary: Assigns memory specifications to prototypes based on a set of user-configurable rules.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.SetEntryPointUpdate
files.Summary: A flow graph update that sets the graph's entry point to a new block.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.StrictExceptionDelayability
files.Summary: Exception delayability rules that disallow delaying exceptions in all cases.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.TrivialAliasAnalysisResult
files.Summary: A truly trivial alias analysis result implementation: all values are deemed to must-alias themselves and may-alias all other values.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.TrivialInstructionExceptionSpecs
files.Summary: An instruction exception specification mapping that trivially copies prototype exception specifications.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.ValueLiveness
files.Summary: Describes which variables are live at any location in a control flow graph.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.ValueNullability
files.Summary: An analysis result that tells if values produce non-null or dereferenceable pointers.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.ValueNumbering
files.Summary: A mapping of values to representative values for a particular control-flow graph.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.ValueNumberingAnalysis
files.Summary: An analysis that computes value numbers.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.ValueNumberingInstructionComparer
files.Summary: A specialized instruction comparer for instructions that uses value numbers to more accurately compare instructions. Assumes that all instructions being compared are defined by the same graph. The equality relation that arises from this comparer is that of semantic instruction equivalence, not of syntactic equality.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.ValueUseAnalysis
files.Summary: An analysis that figures out where values are used.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Analysis.ValueUses
files.Summary: A mapping that describes where values are used.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.BasicBlock
files.Summary: A basic block in a control-flow graph.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.BasicBlockBuilder
files.Summary: A basic block in a mutable control-flow graph builder.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.BasicBlockTag
files.Summary: A unique tag type for basic blocks.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.BlockFlow
files.Summary: Describes control flow at the end of a basic block.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.BlockParameter
files.Summary: A parameter to a basic block.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Branch
files.Summary: A branch to a particular block that passes a list of values as arguments.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.BranchArgument
files.Summary: An argument to a branch.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.BranchArgumentKind
files.Summary: An enumeration of things a branch argument can be.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Flow.FlowInstructionBuilder
files.Summary: An instruction reference to an unnamed instruction in block flow.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Flow.JumpFlow
files.Summary: Control flow that unconditionally jumps to a particular branch.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Flow.ReturnFlow
files.Summary: Control flow that returns control to the caller.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Flow.StructuralSwitchFlowComparer
files.Summary: An equality comparer that for structural switch flow equality.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Flow.SwitchCase
files.Summary: A case in switch flow.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Flow.SwitchFlow
files.Summary: Switch flow, which tries to match a value against a list of constants in cases and takes an appropriate branch based on which case is selected, if any.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Flow.TryFlow
files.Summary: Control flow that executes an instruction and checks if that instruction throws. If it does, an exception-path branch is taken. Otherwise, a success-path branch is taken.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Flow.UnreachableFlow
files.Summary: Control flow that marks the end of a basic block as unreachable.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.FlowGraph
files.Summary: An immutable control-flow graph that consists of basic blocks.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.FlowGraphBuilder
files.Summary: A mutable view of an immutable control-flow graph.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.IBodyMethod
files.Summary: A method that defines a method body.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Instruction
files.Summary: An instruction: a statement that produces a single value.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.InstructionBuilder
files.Summary:
A reference to an instruction in a control-flow graph, which can either be a named instruction that is defined directly by a basic block or an unnamed instruction included in a block's flow.

This is a mutable reference: it refers to an instruction in a control-flow graph builder and that instruction can be changed.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.InstructionPrototype
files.Summary: Describes an instruction's prototype: everything there is to an instruction except for its arguments.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Instructions.Alignment
files.Summary: Specifies the alignment of the data referred to by a load or store operation.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Instructions.AllocaArrayPrototype
files.Summary: A prototype for alloca-array instructions, which allocate a variable-length array of values on the stack.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Instructions.AllocaPrototype
files.Summary: A prototype for alloca instructions, which allocate a single value on the stack.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Instructions.ArithmeticIntrinsics.Operators
files.Summary: A collection of names for arithmetic operations.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Instructions.ArithmeticIntrinsics
files.Summary: Supports creating, recognizing and parsing arithmetic intrinsics.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Instructions.ArrayIntrinsics.Operators
files.Summary: A collection of names for array operations.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Instructions.ArrayIntrinsics
files.Summary: Supports creating, recognizing and parsing array-related intrinsics.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Instructions.BoxPrototype
files.Summary: A prototype for instructions that box value types.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Instructions.CallPrototype
files.Summary: An instruction prototype for call instructions: instructions that call a method.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Instructions.ConstantPrototype
files.Summary: A prototype for instructions that produce a constant value.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Instructions.ConstrainedCallPrototype
files.Summary: An instruction prototype for constrained call instructions: instructions that call a method using virtual lookup in a way that is suitable for both reference and value types.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Instructions.CopyPrototype
files.Summary: The prototype for copy instructions.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Instructions.DynamicCastPrototype
files.Summary: A prototype for dynamic cast instructions: instructions that convert one pointer type to another but check that this conversion is indeed legal; if it is not, then a null pointer is produced.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Instructions.ExceptionIntrinsics.Operators
files.Summary: A collection of names for exception handling operations.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Instructions.ExceptionIntrinsics
files.Summary: Supports creating, recognizing and parsing exception handling intrinsics.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Instructions.Fused.FusedInstructionPrototype
files.Summary: A prototype for a fused instruction: a special composite instruction that is entirely equivalent to a sequence of core instructions. Fused instructions are mostly useful for making back-ends emit better code.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Instructions.Fused.LoadFieldPrototype
files.Summary: An instruction prototype that loads a field. It is a fused instruction prototype that is equivalent to a get-field-pointer followed by a load.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Instructions.Fused.StoreFieldPrototype
files.Summary: An instruction prototype that stores a field. It is a fused instruction prototype that is equivalent to a get-field-pointer followed by a store.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Instructions.GetFieldPointerPrototype
files.Summary: A prototype for instructions that compute the address of a field from a base address.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Instructions.GetStaticFieldPointerPrototype
files.Summary: A prototype for instructions that compute the address of a field from a base address.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Instructions.IndirectCallPrototype
files.Summary: An instruction prototype for indirect call instructions: instructions that call a delegate or function pointer.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Instructions.IntrinsicNamespace
files.Summary: Represents a namespace of intrinsics.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Instructions.IntrinsicPrototype
files.Summary:
An instruction prototype for intrinsics: instructions that behave like calls but are not (necessarily) implemented as calls.

Various parts of a compiler recognize intrinsics relevant to them and ignore the others.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Instructions.LoadPrototype
files.Summary: A prototype for load instructions that dereference pointers.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Instructions.MemoryIntrinsics.Operators
files.Summary: A collection of names for memory operations.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Instructions.MemoryIntrinsics
files.Summary: Supports creating, recognizing and parsing memory manipulation intrinsics.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Instructions.MethodLookup
files.Summary: An enumeration of method lookup strategies.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Instructions.NewDelegatePrototype
files.Summary: A prototype for an instruction that creates a delegate from a method.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Instructions.NewObjectPrototype
files.Summary: A prototype for instructions that allocate storage on the heap for an object and initialize it using a constructor.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Instructions.ObjectIntrinsics.Operators
files.Summary: A collection of names for object-oriented operations.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Instructions.ObjectIntrinsics
files.Summary: Supports creating, recognizing and parsing object-oriented intrinsics.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Instructions.ReinterpretCastPrototype
files.Summary: A prototype for reinterpret cast instructions: instructions that convert one pointer type to another and are free to assume that this conversion will always succeed.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Instructions.SizeOfPrototype
files.Summary: A prototype for sizeof instructions, which compute the size of a type.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Instructions.StorePrototype
files.Summary: A prototype for store instructions that set the value of a pointer's pointee.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Instructions.UnboxPrototype
files.Summary: A prototype for instructions that unbox boxed value types. Unbox instructions take box pointers and turn them into reference pointers to their contents.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.MethodBody
files.Summary: A method body: a method implementation represented as a control-flow graph along with a private copy of the return parameter, 'this' parameter and input parameters.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.NamedInstruction
files.Summary: A named instruction in the context of a control-flow graph.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.NamedInstructionBuilder
files.Summary: A named instruction in a mutable control-flow graph builder.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Pipeline.AssemblyContentDescription
files.Summary: A description of a target assembly's contents.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Pipeline.ITarget
files.Summary: A common interface for interacting with back-ends.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Pipeline.ITargetAssembly
files.Summary: An assembly generated by a back-end.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Pipeline.OnDemandOptimizer
files.Summary: An optimizer that computes optimized method bodies on an on-demand basis: method bodies are not optimized until they are requested. Optimized method bodies are cached, so method bodies are never optimized twice.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Pipeline.Optimization
files.Summary: Describes a method body optimization.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Pipeline.OptimizationState
files.Summary: A container for shared optimization state.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Pipeline.Optimizer
files.Summary: A base class for optimizers: objects that manage method bodies as they are being optimized and respond to method body queries.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Pipeline.ParallelOnDemandOptimizer
files.Summary: A variant of the on-demand method optimizer that runs batches of tasks in parallel rather than in sequence.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Target.IInstructionSelector<TInstruction>
files.Summary: A base class for instruction selection algorithms. Instruction selectors take IR instructions and turn them into sequences of target-specific instructions.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Target.ILinearInstructionSelector<TInstruction>
files.Summary: An instruction selection algorithm for instruction sets that produce linear streams of instructions, that is, control flow is expressed using branches to branch targets.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Target.IStackInstructionSelector<TInstruction>
files.Summary: An instruction selector for a stack machine that can transfer data using either stack slots or register loads and stores.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Target.InstructionStreamBuilder<TInstruction>
files.Summary: Translates flow graphs to linear sequences of target-specific instructions.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Target.PeepholeOptimizer<TInstruction, TExternalRef>
files.Summary: A target-specific peephole optimizer: an optimizer that walks through a linear sequence of target-specific instructions, recognizes patterns and rewrites small batches of instructions.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Target.PeepholeRewriteRule<TInstruction>
files.Summary: A rewrite rule as used by a peephole optimizer.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Target.SelectedFlowInstructions<TInstruction>
files.Summary: A collection of selected instructions for block flow.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Target.SelectedFlowInstructions
files.Summary: A collection of selected instructions for block flow.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Target.SelectedInstructions<TInstruction>
files.Summary: A collection of selected instructions for a value.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Target.SelectedInstructions
files.Summary: A collection of selected instructions for a value.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Target.StackInstructionStreamBuilder<TInstruction>
files.Summary: An instruction stream builder that manages data transfer using a combination of stack slots and explicit register loads/stores, as commonly offered by stack machines.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Transforms.AllocaToRegister
files.Summary: The "alloca to register" transformation, which tries to eliminate alloca instructions whose addresses do not escape.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Transforms.BlockFusion
files.Summary: An optimization that fuses basic blocks, eliminating unnecessary jumps.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Transforms.BoxToAlloca
files.Summary: A transform that looks for box instructions that are only ever unboxed and replaces them with alloca instructions. The transform is only applied to box instructions for which the unboxed pointers do not escape.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Transforms.CallDevirtualization
files.Summary: The call devirtualization optimization: a transform that takes iterates over virtual calls in a control-flow graph and tries to reduce them to a static call.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Transforms.ConstantPropagation
files.Summary: A transform that evaluates non-effectful instructions at compile-time and propagates their results. Essentially just an implementation of sparse conditional constant propagation.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Transforms.CopyPropagation
files.Summary: The copy propagation transform, which replaces references to values that are merely copies of values with the copied values themselves.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Transforms.DeadBlockElimination
files.Summary: A transform that removes all blocks not reachable from the entry point block.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Transforms.DeadValueElimination
files.Summary: Removes unused, non-effectful instructions and basic block parameters from flow graphs.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Transforms.DuplicateReturns
files.Summary: An optimization that replaces direct jumps to blocks that return a copy of a value with the return itself.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Transforms.ForwardRegisters
files.Summary: A transform that rewrites control-flow graphs in register forwarding form, that is, it rewrites control-flow graphs such that basic blocks only use values that are defined in that basic block. Block parameters and branch arguments are used to "import" and "export" values.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Transforms.FuseMemoryAccesses
files.Summary:
A transform that tries to turn loads from and stores to special addresses like field pointers into fused loads and store instructions.

Back-ends are this pass' main target audience; fused loads and stores produce better codegen for back-ends such as the CIL back-end.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Transforms.GlobalValueNumbering
files.Summary: An optimization that replaces redundant computations by copies based on the results of value numbering and dominator tree analyses.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Transforms.Inlining
files.Summary: The inlining optimization: a transform that copies the function bodies of callees into the caller, replacing the call with its implementation.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Transforms.InstructionReordering
files.Summary: A transformation that reorders instructions. It is intended to be used prior to codegen. Instruction reordering helps reduce register pressure and promotes register-to-stack conversion on virtual machines that use an evaluation stack.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Transforms.InstructionSimplification
files.Summary: An intraprocedural transform that greedily applies instruction simplifications.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Transforms.IntraproceduralOptimization
files.Summary: Describes an intraprocedural optimization: an optimization that considers a method implementation only and does not rely on the implementation of other methods.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Transforms.JumpThreading
files.Summary: An optimization that tries to eliminate repeated jumps between blocks.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Transforms.JumpToEntryRemoval
files.Summary: A transform that removes all direct jumps to the entry point by replacing the current entry point with a 'thunk' basic block that is entered once per function call.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Transforms.MemoryAccessElimination
files.Summary: A pass that tries to eliminate loads and stores, replacing them with local value copies instead.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Transforms.PartialScalarReplacement
files.Summary: An optimization that replaces aggregates by scalars, i.e., their fields. Depending on the control-flow graph, aggregates might be replaced by scalars on some control-flow paths while remaining untouched on others.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Transforms.ReassociateOperators
files.Summary: An optimization that reassociates operators to simplify computations.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Transforms.ScalarReplacement
files.Summary: The scalar replacement of aggregates transform, which tries to decompose local variables of aggregate types, replacing them with other local variables that represent their fields.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Transforms.SwitchLowering
files.Summary: A switch lowering transform, which rewrites general switch flow as if-else switch flow and jump table switch flow.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Transforms.SwitchSimplification
files.Summary: An optimization that transforms switch flows in a way that makes it easier for other optimizations to reason about said switches.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Transforms.TailRecursionElimination
files.Summary: A transform that rewrites static calls to the current method just prior to a return as unconditional jumps to the entry point.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.Transforms.Transform
files.Summary: A transform that can be applied to a flow graph.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.UniqueTag
files.Summary: A base class for unique tags: identifiers for values that have a name and use referential equality instead of structural equality.

files.Title: Flame.Compiler.ValueTag
files.Summary: A unique tag type for values.

files.Title: Flame.Constant
files.Summary: A constant value.

files.Title: Flame.Constants.BooleanConstant
files.Summary: Helpers for Boolean constants.

files.Title: Flame.Constants.DefaultConstant
files.Summary: A default-value constant, which represents the default value of some type, typically characterized by the all-zeroes bit pattern.

files.Title: Flame.Constants.FieldTokenConstant
files.Summary: A field token constant: a constant that wraps a runtime handle to a field.

files.Title: Flame.Constants.Float32Constant
files.Summary: A 32-bit floating point constant.

files.Title: Flame.Constants.Float64Constant
files.Summary: A 64-bit floating point constant.

files.Title: Flame.Constants.IntegerConstant
files.Summary: Describes an integer value that adheres to an integer spec.

files.Title: Flame.Constants.IntegerSpec
files.Summary: Describes the size and signedness of an integer. Signed integers are assumed to use a two's complement scheme.

files.Title: Flame.Constants.MethodTokenConstant
files.Summary: A method token constant: a constant that wraps a runtime handle to a method.

files.Title: Flame.Constants.NullConstant
files.Summary: A null pointer constant.

files.Title: Flame.Constants.SignedDivisionMagic
files.Summary: A collection of magic constants that can be used to perform signed integer division by constant.

files.Title: Flame.Constants.StringConstant
files.Summary: A character string constant.

files.Title: Flame.Constants.TypeTokenConstant
files.Summary: A type token constant: a constant that wraps a runtime handle to a type.

files.Title: Flame.Constants.UnsignedDivisionMagic
files.Summary: A collection of magic constants that can be used to perform unsigned integer division by constant.

files.Title: Flame.ContractHelpers
files.Summary: A collection of functions that help enforce contracts.

files.Title: Flame.ExceptionSpecification.Exact
files.Summary: An exception specification that can throw an exception of exactly one type.

files.Title: Flame.ExceptionSpecification.Union
files.Summary: An exception specification that is the union of a sequence of other exception specifications: the union can throw an exception iff said exception is throwable by any of the operands.

files.Title: Flame.ExceptionSpecification
files.Summary: Specifies the exception throwing behavior of a method or instruction.

files.Title: Flame.ExceptionSpecificationExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods that make working with exception specifications easier.

files.Title: Flame.GenericName
files.Summary: Defines a generic name; a simple name that is instantiated by a number of generic type arguments.

files.Title: Flame.IAccessor
files.Summary: Describes an accessor.

files.Title: Flame.IAssembly
files.Summary: Defines a common interface for assemblies: collections of types.

files.Title: Flame.IAttribute
files.Summary: Defines common functionality for member attributes.

files.Title: Flame.IField
files.Summary: Describes a field: a type member that stores some data.

files.Title: Flame.IGenericMember
files.Summary: Defines a generic member: a member that has a list of generic parameters.

files.Title: Flame.IGenericParameter
files.Summary: Defines a generic parameter.

files.Title: Flame.IMember
files.Summary: The root interface for members: constructs that have a name, a full name and a set of attributes.

files.Title: Flame.IMethod
files.Summary: Defines a common interface for methods.

files.Title: Flame.IProperty
files.Summary: Describes a property: a collection of accessors that manipulate a (virtual) value.

files.Title: Flame.IType
files.Summary: Defines a type of value.

files.Title: Flame.ITypeMember
files.Summary: Defines a common interface for members that may be defined inside types.

files.Title: Flame.Ir.Codec<TObj, TEnc>
files.Summary: An encoder/decoder for values.

files.Title: Flame.Ir.CodecElement<TObj, TEnc>
files.Summary: An encoder/decoder for a specific type of object.

files.Title: Flame.Ir.ConstantCodec
files.Summary: A codec for constants.

files.Title: Flame.Ir.DecoderState
files.Summary: Decodes Loyc LNodes to Flame's intermediate representation.

files.Title: Flame.Ir.EncoderState
files.Summary: Encodes Flame's intermediate representation as Loyc LNodes.

files.Title: Flame.Ir.FeedbackHelpers
files.Summary: A collection of functions that help produce wonderful diagnostics, geared particularly toward LNodes.

files.Title: Flame.Ir.InstructionCodecElements
files.Summary: Defines codec elements for instruction prototypes.

files.Title: Flame.Ir.IrAssembly
files.Summary: An assembly that is decoded from a Flame IR field LNode.

files.Title: Flame.Ir.IrCodec
files.Summary: An encoder/decoder for every configurable element of Flame's intermediate representation.

files.Title: Flame.Ir.IrField
files.Summary: A field that is decoded from a Flame IR field LNode.

files.Title: Flame.Ir.IrMember
files.Summary: A base class for members that are decoded from LNodes.

files.Title: Flame.Ir.IrMethod
files.Summary: A method that is decoded from a Flame IR method LNode.

files.Title: Flame.Ir.IrType
files.Summary: A type that is decoded from a Flame IR type LNode.

files.Title: Flame.Ir.PiecewiseCodec<TObj>
files.Summary: An encoder/decoder for a broad class of values that uses identifiers to differentiate between different types of encoded objects.

files.Title: Flame.Ir.TypeCodec
files.Summary: A codec for type references.

files.Title: Flame.Ir.TypeDefinitionCodec
files.Summary: A codec for type definitions.

files.Title: Flame.Ir.TypeMemberCodec
files.Summary: A codec for type member references.

files.Title: Flame.Ir.TypeMemberDefinitionCodec
files.Summary: A codec for type member definitions.

files.Title: Flame.Llvm.CMangler
files.Summary: A name mangler implementation for C compatibility. Names are left neither mangled nor prefixed.

files.Title: Flame.Llvm.ClosedMetadataFormat
files.Summary: A VTable-based metadata format based on the closed-world assumption, that is, the set of all members is known at compile time and will not change.

files.Title: Flame.Llvm.ClrInternalCallImplementor
files.Summary: An internal call implementor for the CLR.

files.Title: Flame.Llvm.Emit.ModuleBuilder
files.Summary: A wrapper around an LLVM module that extends the wrapped module with information relevant to managed languages.

files.Title: Flame.Llvm.GCInterface
files.Summary: An application-GC interface, which defines how the application interacts with the GC. The application-GC interface's responsibilities include root set management, object allocation and the object header format.

files.Title: Flame.Llvm.InternalCallImplementor
files.Summary: Responsible for implementing methods that have no method body and are marked as internal calls.

files.Title: Flame.Llvm.ItaniumMangler
files.Summary: A name mangler implementation that strives for compatibility with the Itanium C++ ABI name mangling scheme.

files.Title: Flame.Llvm.LlvmBackend
files.Summary: Provides a high-level interface to Flame's LLVM back-end.

files.Title: Flame.Llvm.MallocInterface
files.Summary: A "GC" interface that uses the malloc function to allocate memory. No memory is ever freed.

files.Title: Flame.Llvm.MetadataFormat
files.Summary: A description of a member metadata format. Member metadata is used for type instance tests, virtual method lookup and reflection.

files.Title: Flame.Llvm.NameMangler
files.Summary: Describes common functionality implemented by name manglers.

files.Title: Flame.Llvm.ObjectDecoder<TObj, TPtr>
files.Summary: Decodes in-memory representations of objects.

files.Title: Flame.Llvm.ObjectEncoder<TObj, TPtr>
files.Summary: Encodes in-memory objects.

files.Title: Flame.Llvm.ObjectMarshal<T>
files.Summary: Encodes and/or decodes in-memory objects.

files.Title: Flame.Parameter
files.Summary: Describes a parameter to a method.

files.Title: Flame.PointerName
files.Summary: Defines a poiner name: a qualified name that is turned into a pointer.

files.Title: Flame.QualifiedName
files.Summary: A data structure that represents a qualified name.

files.Title: Flame.SimpleName
files.Summary: Defines a simple name: a name and the number of type parameters it takes.

files.Title: Flame.TypeExtensions
files.Summary: A collection of extension and helper methods that simplify working with types.

files.Title: Flame.TypeParent
files.Summary: Gets a type's parent, that is, the entity that defines the type. A type parent can be either an assembly, another type, a method (for generic parameters only), or nothing at all.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.AccessModifier
files.Summary: An enumeration of access modifiers: attributes that determine which members can access a member.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.AccessModifierAttribute
files.Summary: A collection of constants and methods that relate to access modifier attributes.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.AccessRules
files.Summary: A base class for rules that define which members may refer to other members.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.AssemblyResolver
files.Summary: Resolves assemblies based on assembly identities.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.ContainerType
files.Summary: A base type for types that refer to some number of homogeneously-typed elements.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.DescribedAccessor
files.Summary: A property accessor that can be constructed incrementally in an imperative fashion.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.DescribedAssembly
files.Summary: An assembly that can be constructed in piece by piece, an imperative fashion.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.DescribedBodyAccessor
files.Summary: A property accessor that can be constructed incrementally in an imperative fashion and defines a method body.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.DescribedBodyMethod
files.Summary: A method that can be constructed incrementally in an imperative fashion and defines a method body.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.DescribedField
files.Summary: A field that can be constructed incrementally in an imperative fashion.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.DescribedGenericMember
files.Summary: A generic member that can be constructed incrementally in an imperative fashion.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.DescribedGenericParameter
files.Summary: A generic parameter that can be constructed piece by piece in an imperative fashion.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.DescribedMember
files.Summary: A member that can be constructed incrementally in an imperative fashion.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.DescribedMethod
files.Summary: A method that can be constructed incrementally in an imperative fashion.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.DescribedType
files.Summary: A type that can be constructed incrementally in an imperative fashion.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.DirectMethodSpecialization
files.Summary: A generic method specialization obtained by passing type arguments directly to a generic declaration.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.DirectTypeSpecialization
files.Summary: A generic type that is instantiated with a list of type arguments.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.ErrorType
files.Summary:
A special type that signals that an error occurred and that the corresponding error has been reported already.

Further errors that arise because an error type is encountered should be suppressed. For example, it is wrong to report an error when a member of an error type is accessed. Reporting the error would confuse the user---the true error here is that the type of a value cannot be recovered, not that the error type does not have any members.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.ExceptionSpecificationAttribute
files.Summary: An attribute that attaches an exception specification to a method.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.ExternAttribute
files.Summary: An attribute that indicates that a method is implemented by calling into an external library.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.FlagAttribute
files.Summary: A collection of constants and methods that relate to simple flag attributes.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.ImpreciseBoolean
files.Summary: A three-valued "Boolean" type that allows Boolean property analyses to express uncertainty.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.IndirectAccessorSpecialization
files.Summary: An accessor specialization that is obtained by observing an accessor of an indirect property specialization.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.IndirectFieldSpecialization
files.Summary: A specialization of a field belonging to a recursively generic type.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.IndirectGenericParameterSpecialization
files.Summary: A generic specialization of a generic parameter that is obtained by specializing the declaring member of a generic parameter definition.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.IndirectMethodSpecialization
files.Summary: A specialization of a method that is obtained by specializing the method's parent type.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.IndirectPropertySpecialization
files.Summary: A specialization of a property that is obtained by observing a property of a generic type specialization, direct or otherwise.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.IndirectTypeSpecialization
files.Summary: A type that is defined in an instantiated generic type.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.IntegerSpecAttribute
files.Summary: A collection of constants and methods that relate to integer specification attributes.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.IntrinsicAttribute
files.Summary: Describes a named attribute that is well-understood by the compiler.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.MemberMapping
files.Summary: A (type mapping, method mapping, field mapping) triple.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.MemorySpecificationAttribute
files.Summary: An attribute that attaches a memory specification to a method.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.MethodSpecialization
files.Summary: A base type for method specializations.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.MutableTypeEnvironment
files.Summary:
A type environment that wraps an inner type environment that can be changed at will.

The main use-case for this kind of environment is a situation where the type environment for an assembly is defined by that assembly itself but the assembly does not allow for the type environment to change.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.NullAssemblyResolver
files.Summary: An assembly resolver implementation that never successfully resolves an assembly. Useful for testing and building composite assembly resolvers.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.PointerKind
files.Summary: Identifies a particular kind of pointer.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.PointerType
files.Summary: A type for pointers or references to values.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.ReadOnlyTypeResolver
files.Summary: A read-only view of a type resolver.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.StandardAccessRules
files.Summary: The "standard" access rules, which determine accessibility based on access modifiers.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.SubtypingRules
files.Summary: Defines a subtyping relation on types.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.TypeEnvironment
files.Summary: A base class for classes that augment Flame's type system with types specific to a particular environment

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.TypeFuncVisitor
files.Summary: A type visitor that uses a type-to-type mapping function under the hood.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.TypeMappingVisitor
files.Summary: A type visitor that replaces types according to a dictionary.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.TypeResolver
files.Summary: Indexes assemblies and resolves types based on their names.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.TypeResolverNamespace
files.Summary: An artifical namespace introduced by a type resolver.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.TypeSpecialization
files.Summary: A base type for generic type specializations.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.TypeVisitor
files.Summary: A type of object that recursively applies a mapping to types.

files.Title: Flame.TypeSystem.VirtualMethodSetExtensions
files.Summary: Defines an extension for finding the virtual method set of a type: the set of all virtual methods defined in the type itself or any of its (recursive) base types that are not (yet) implemented in the type.

files.Title: Flame.UnqualifiedName
files.Summary: A base class for unqualified names: names that can be assigned to members, but that are not qualified by their enclosing members.
